title: node-sass@3.11.0 breaks build ⚠️
body:
Hello lovely humans, [node-sass](https://www.npmjs.com/package/node-sass) just published its new version 3.11.0.
State Failing tests :warning:
Dependency node-sass
New version 3.11.0
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build kept failing**. **It looks like your project, in its current form, is malfunctioning** and this update didn’t really change that. I don’t want to leave you in the dark about updates though. I recommend you get your project passing and then check the impact of this update again. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- [GitHub Release](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/releases/tag/v3.11.0)

Features

  • Better cache reuse for faster installs (#1566, @nschonni)
  • Respect NO_PROXY when downloading the binary (#1724, @xzyfer)
  • Add Node 7 support (#1766, @xzyfer)

Fixes

  • SASS_BINARY_SITE typo documentation (#1744, @pselden)
  • Fix links in troubleshooting documentation (#1753, @NicolaiSoeborg)

Supported Environments

OS Architecture Node
Windows x86 & x64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6,7
OSX x64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
Linux x86 & x64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
FreeBSD i386 & amd64 0.10, 0.12, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6

*Linux support refers to Ubuntu, Debian, and CentOS 5

--- The new version differs by 14 commits . - [`73726fe`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/73726fe7b28b8dfc82f3e03591fa3488348abae3) 3.11.0 - [`cb328e3`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/cb328e325de6c914432770b3eaaa44af6bca88b7) Merge pull request #1753 from NicolaiSoeborg/patch-1 - [`4116c38`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/4116c389a5840fbcc7f107c3eeab6aec0a938ba5) Merge pull request #1725 from xzyfer/fix/no-proxy - [`5dba770`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/5dba770e05ea37fb833091b8f6d560a8683db9ae) Factor our proxy resolution for testability - [`3a4e9c6`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/3a4e9c6c69a0571e20a9ae48885ad23c29200109) Respect NO_PROXY when downloading the binary - [`bd6d7a3`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/bd6d7a35cb5791a33cbda0051c6d80ddffd6f0f8) Add Node 7 as a supported environment - [`d27ff73`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/d27ff73fe5bed54ce28023b87aa6bc5c30f233a0) Fix links in troubleshooting.md - [`360a430`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/360a4308bac15219782fa6f7fe4f46df8d53929e) Merge pull request #1744 from pselden/patch-1 - [`837ee74`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/837ee744c9cdb996325b19aae307993a87b176ff) Fix process argument binary configuration example - [`04e74f4`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/04e74f45fa769dc229356e338c798f0f7e3be834) Restore pkg in install.js - [`abce8c1`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/abce8c1aa2a852ef31ce8e2b8c93a39665b876a6) Merge pull request #1714 from nschonni/npm-download-cache - [`63d103f`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/63d103fab2e8cc1ef84af2deaac71d5c2070c2bc) Merge pull request #1733 from xzyfer/feat/poc-testing-install - [`b1188bc`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/b1188bc9f212aacae6adb2cb15dc793f1842651e) POC for adding unit test coverage to install - [`b655852`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/b6558523aaaa29360b50b784e7155fd157cef038) Install: Use a cache folder for binary download See the [full diff](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/compare/7e27148d834dc2b092f4882895a0b18e70c4bbea...73726fe7b28b8dfc82f3e03591fa3488348abae3). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
